records.m_Talk_ENG: Damn these C.O.s! They're relentless!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Damn these C.O.s! They're relentless!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Damn these C.O.s! They're relentless!

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's gotta be this Immortal System Core or whatever that's drawing them in like moths to a flame!
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's gotta be this Immortal System Core or whatever that's drawing them in like moths to a flame!
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's gotta be this Immortal System Core or whatever that's drawing them in like moths to a flame!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Tch... Why me of all people? Why'd I get stuck with this thing...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Tch... Why me of all people? Why'd I get stuck with this thing...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Tch... Why me of all people? Why'd I get stuck with this thing...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ngh?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ngh?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ngh?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: What the?! Where did this thing come from all of a sudden?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: What the?! Where did this thing come from all of a sudden?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: What the?! Where did this thing come from all of a sudden?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: A foolish mortal, daring to lay hands on the Queen's treasure...
records.m_Talk_DEU: A foolish mortal, daring to lay hands on the Queen's treasure...
records.m_Talk_FRA: A foolish mortal, daring to lay hands on the Queen's treasure...

records.m_Talk_ENG: That sin can only be cleansed with your life.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That sin can only be cleansed with your life.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That sin can only be cleansed with your life.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I shall rip you apart and reassemble you a thousand times over, so that you feel every second of the pain.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I shall rip you apart and reassemble you a thousand times over, so that you feel every second of the pain.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I shall rip you apart and reassemble you a thousand times over, so that you feel every second of the pain.

records.m_Talk_ENG: A Shadow...? No, the aura's completely different...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: A Shadow...? No, the aura's completely different...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: A Shadow...? No, the aura's completely different...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Could it be... the Demon Lord's Apostle?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Could it be... the Demon Lord's Apostle?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Could it be... the Demon Lord's Apostle?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Oh? You dodged my blade not once, but twice. Impressive.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Oh? You dodged my blade not once, but twice. Impressive.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Oh? You dodged my blade not once, but twice. Impressive.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I do wonder... if I tear you limb from limb, what kind of melody would you scream in?
records.m_Talk_DEU: I do wonder... if I tear you limb from limb, what kind of melody would you scream in?
records.m_Talk_FRA: I do wonder... if I tear you limb from limb, what kind of melody would you scream in?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Sorry, no time for a performance!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Sorry, no time for a performance!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Sorry, no time for a performance!

records.m_Talk_ENG: I've got a delivery to make, and I'd rather not find out what happens if I'm late!
records.m_Talk_DEU: I've got a delivery to make, and I'd rather not find out what happens if I'm late!
records.m_Talk_FRA: I've got a delivery to make, and I'd rather not find out what happens if I'm late!

records.m_Talk_ENG: A head-on fight's impossible.
records.m_Talk_DEU: A head-on fight's impossible.
records.m_Talk_FRA: A head-on fight's impossible.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'll have to create an opening and make a run for it...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'll have to create an opening and make a run for it...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'll have to create an opening and make a run for it...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Right now!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Right now!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Right now!

records.m_Talk_ENG: So long, Shadow!
records.m_Talk_DEU: So long, Shadow!
records.m_Talk_FRA: So long, Shadow!

records.m_Talk_ENG: All right, this should at least buy me some time...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: All right, this should at least buy me some time...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: All right, this should at least buy me some time...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Urgh...?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Urgh...?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Urgh...?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Foolish mortal.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Foolish mortal.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Foolish mortal.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Did you truly think such a petty trick would work on us?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Did you truly think such a petty trick would work on us?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Did you truly think such a petty trick would work on us?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ahaha, really? A Shadow resorting to sheer numbers?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ahaha, really? A Shadow resorting to sheer numbers?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ahaha, really? A Shadow resorting to sheer numbers?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hey now, it's just me over here! Ganging up's a little cowardly, don't you think?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hey now, it's just me over here! Ganging up's a little cowardly, don't you think?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hey now, it's just me over here! Ganging up's a little cowardly, don't you think?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Haha... There's no need to fear, mortal.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Haha... There's no need to fear, mortal.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Haha... There's no need to fear, mortal.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Once the agony of reassembly ends, you too shall forget your past life... and be reborn as one of the Queen's sisters.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Once the agony of reassembly ends, you too shall forget your past life... and be reborn as one of the Queen's sisters.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Once the agony of reassembly ends, you too shall forget your past life... and be reborn as one of the Queen's sisters.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So surrender to your fate, and be consumed by the shadow!
records.m_Talk_DEU: So surrender to your fate, and be consumed by the shadow!
records.m_Talk_FRA: So surrender to your fate, and be consumed by the shadow!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Reborn as a sister, huh?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Reborn as a sister, huh?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Reborn as a sister, huh?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Bad idea. I'm an orphan and a certified troublemaker. You'll regret it if I become your sister.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Bad idea. I'm an orphan and a certified troublemaker. You'll regret it if I become your sister.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Bad idea. I'm an orphan and a certified troublemaker. You'll regret it if I become your sister.

records.m_Talk_ENG: And there's no way I'm dying in a dump like this!
records.m_Talk_DEU: And there's no way I'm dying in a dump like this!
records.m_Talk_FRA: And there's no way I'm dying in a dump like this!

records.m_Talk_ENG: If I go down first, what'll those idiots think of their leader...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: If I go down first, what'll those idiots think of their leader...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: If I go down first, what'll those idiots think of their leader...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Making a last-ditch effort?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Making a last-ditch effort?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Making a last-ditch effort?

records.m_Talk_ENG: To think a mere mortal managed to eliminate five of my sisters in an instant... not bad.
records.m_Talk_DEU: To think a mere mortal managed to eliminate five of my sisters in an instant... not bad.
records.m_Talk_FRA: To think a mere mortal managed to eliminate five of my sisters in an instant... not bad.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But...
records.m_Talk_DEU: But...
records.m_Talk_FRA: But...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hmm?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hmm?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hmm?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Priority Artifact secured.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Priority Artifact secured.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Priority Artifact secured.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You've held out well until now, Free Rider lady.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You've held out well until now, Free Rider lady.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You've held out well until now, Free Rider lady.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ugh... It's Freedom Rider, not Free Rider...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ugh... It's Freedom Rider, not Free Rider...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ugh... It's Freedom Rider, not Free Rider...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Damn it...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Damn it...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Damn it...

records.m_Talk_ENG: You're that soldier from before, aren't you? Still alive, even after that wound?
records.m_Talk_DEU: You're that soldier from before, aren't you? Still alive, even after that wound?
records.m_Talk_FRA: You're that soldier from before, aren't you? Still alive, even after that wound?

records.m_Talk_ENG: For a mortal, your tenacity is truly something else.
records.m_Talk_DEU: For a mortal, your tenacity is truly something else.
records.m_Talk_FRA: For a mortal, your tenacity is truly something else.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Haha! What can I say, I'm hard to kill.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Haha! What can I say, I'm hard to kill.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Haha! What can I say, I'm hard to kill.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So you'd better brace yourself. This one's my revenge match.
records.m_Talk_DEU: So you'd better brace yourself. This one's my revenge match.
records.m_Talk_FRA: So you'd better brace yourself. This one's my revenge match.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...The Queen summons me.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...The Queen summons me.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...The Queen summons me.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'll withdraw for now.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'll withdraw for now.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'll withdraw for now.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But your fate, mortals, was sealed by the Queen from the very beginning.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But your fate, mortals, was sealed by the Queen from the very beginning.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But your fate, mortals, was sealed by the Queen from the very beginning.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Struggle all you like. In the end, everything will be swept away by Her army.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Struggle all you like. In the end, everything will be swept away by Her army.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Struggle all you like. In the end, everything will be swept away by Her army.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ah hah hah hah hah!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ah hah hah hah hah!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ah hah hah hah hah!

records.m_Talk_ENG: I heard the emergency surgery went well.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I heard the emergency surgery went well.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I heard the emergency surgery went well.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Feeling any better, lady?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Feeling any better, lady?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Feeling any better, lady?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Still wearing those damn sunglasses indoors? No wonder you can't see straight, you useless Colonel.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Still wearing those damn sunglasses indoors? No wonder you can't see straight, you useless Colonel.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Still wearing those damn sunglasses indoors? No wonder you can't see straight, you useless Colonel.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You stitched someone back from the brink of death without anesthesia and you're asking if I'm feeling any better?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: You stitched someone back from the brink of death without anesthesia and you're asking if I'm feeling any better?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: You stitched someone back from the brink of death without anesthesia and you're asking if I'm feeling any better?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: It hurts like hell! I'm barely not dead.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It hurts like hell! I'm barely not dead.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It hurts like hell! I'm barely not dead.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Haha, then we're in luck.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Haha, then we're in luck.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Haha, then we're in luck.

records.m_Talk_ENG: See, Minseo? What did I tell you?
records.m_Talk_DEU: See, Minseo? What did I tell you?
records.m_Talk_FRA: See, Minseo? What did I tell you?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Told you. There's no way Amy would die that easily. She's basically immortal.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Told you. There's no way Amy would die that easily. She's basically immortal.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Told you. There's no way Amy would die that easily. She's basically immortal.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Now hand over that chocolate bar you bet.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Now hand over that chocolate bar you bet.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Now hand over that chocolate bar you bet.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Can't believe it... She actually cleared a five-star main quest and came back alive...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Can't believe it... She actually cleared a five-star main quest and came back alive...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Can't believe it... She actually cleared a five-star main quest and came back alive...

records.m_Talk_ENG: I lost, Ms. Hirose... Amy really is a cheat character.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I lost, Ms. Hirose... Amy really is a cheat character.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I lost, Ms. Hirose... Amy really is a cheat character.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hey, come on...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hey, come on...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hey, come on...

records.m_Talk_ENG: I almost died out there, and you were gambling with my life?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: I almost died out there, and you were gambling with my life?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: I almost died out there, and you were gambling with my life?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: No, Amy! It's not like that.
records.m_Talk_DEU: No, Amy! It's not like that.
records.m_Talk_FRA: No, Amy! It's not like that.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It was our own little... ritual to make sure you came back safe.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It was our own little... ritual to make sure you came back safe.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It was our own little... ritual to make sure you came back safe.

records.m_Talk_ENG: A ritual? What kind of nonsense is that supposed to be?
records.m_Talk_DEU: A ritual? What kind of nonsense is that supposed to be?
records.m_Talk_FRA: A ritual? What kind of nonsense is that supposed to be?

records.m_Talk_ENG: No, Ms. Hirose is right.
records.m_Talk_DEU: No, Ms. Hirose is right.
records.m_Talk_FRA: No, Ms. Hirose is right.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Actually... I've got this weird curse. Every time I bet on something, I lose.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Actually... I've got this weird curse. Every time I bet on something, I lose.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Actually... I've got this weird curse. Every time I bet on something, I lose.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So... I bet my chocolate bar against our leader coming back...
records.m_Talk_DEU: So... I bet my chocolate bar against our leader coming back...
records.m_Talk_FRA: So... I bet my chocolate bar against our leader coming back...

records.m_Talk_ENG: I just thought... maybe if I bet against you, fate would flip it and bring you back safely...
records.m_Talk_DEU: I just thought... maybe if I bet against you, fate would flip it and bring you back safely...
records.m_Talk_FRA: I just thought... maybe if I bet against you, fate would flip it and bring you back safely...

records.m_Talk_ENG: So?
records.m_Talk_DEU: So?
records.m_Talk_FRA: So?

records.m_Talk_ENG: So my life's only worth one chocolate bar to you, Minseo? That's all I am to you?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: So my life's only worth one chocolate bar to you, Minseo? That's all I am to you?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: So my life's only worth one chocolate bar to you, Minseo? That's all I am to you?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Eeeek...! I mean... betting something expensive felt like too much pressure...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Eeeek...! I mean... betting something expensive felt like too much pressure...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Eeeek...! I mean... betting something expensive felt like too much pressure...

records.m_Talk_ENG: H-Haha...! Anyway! Amy made it back safe, and that's what really matters, right?
records.m_Talk_DEU: H-Haha...! Anyway! Amy made it back safe, and that's what really matters, right?
records.m_Talk_FRA: H-Haha...! Anyway! Amy made it back safe, and that's what really matters, right?

records.m_Talk_ENG: R-Right! Best news we've had all day!
records.m_Talk_DEU: R-Right! Best news we've had all day!
records.m_Talk_FRA: R-Right! Best news we've had all day!

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Hah hah hah!
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Hah hah hah!
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Hah hah hah!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hah hah hah hah...! O-Ouch...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hah hah hah hah...! O-Ouch...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hah hah hah hah...! O-Ouch...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Whoa, careful! Laughing that hard might tear your stitches!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Whoa, careful! Laughing that hard might tear your stitches!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Whoa, careful! Laughing that hard might tear your stitches!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Haha, no matter how crazy the world gets, you're still the same bunch of lovable idiots...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Haha, no matter how crazy the world gets, you're still the same bunch of lovable idiots...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Haha, no matter how crazy the world gets, you're still the same bunch of lovable idiots...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: But hey, that's what being a Freedom Rider's all about, right?
records.m_Talk_DEU: But hey, that's what being a Freedom Rider's all about, right?
records.m_Talk_FRA: But hey, that's what being a Freedom Rider's all about, right?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Come on, that's just mean! We were genuinely worried, but you call us idiots?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Come on, that's just mean! We were genuinely worried, but you call us idiots?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Come on, that's just mean! We were genuinely worried, but you call us idiots?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ms. Hirose, seriously... clean the chocolate off your mouth before making a point.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ms. Hirose, seriously... clean the chocolate off your mouth before making a point.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ms. Hirose, seriously... clean the chocolate off your mouth before making a point.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Are we done with the heartfelt reunion, ladies?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Are we done with the heartfelt reunion, ladies?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Are we done with the heartfelt reunion, ladies?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Good. Now, I've got a question for Amy.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Good. Now, I've got a question for Amy.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Good. Now, I've got a question for Amy.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I see...
records.m_Talk_DEU: I see...
records.m_Talk_FRA: I see...

records.m_Talk_ENG: More Category 4 C.O.s occupied the facility in addition to the one I defeated...
records.m_Talk_DEU: More Category 4 C.O.s occupied the facility in addition to the one I defeated...
records.m_Talk_FRA: More Category 4 C.O.s occupied the facility in addition to the one I defeated...

records.m_Talk_ENG: If that's the case, then Kyle and Sylvia, who stayed behind...
records.m_Talk_DEU: If that's the case, then Kyle and Sylvia, who stayed behind...
records.m_Talk_FRA: If that's the case, then Kyle and Sylvia, who stayed behind...

records.m_Talk_ENG: They're probably dead.
records.m_Talk_DEU: They're probably dead.
records.m_Talk_FRA: They're probably dead.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If they were alive, they would've contacted HQ by now, one way or another.
records.m_Talk_DEU: If they were alive, they would've contacted HQ by now, one way or another.
records.m_Talk_FRA: If they were alive, they would've contacted HQ by now, one way or another.

records.m_Talk_ENG: In the end, you made the choice a true soldier would, Kyle.
records.m_Talk_DEU: In the end, you made the choice a true soldier would, Kyle.
records.m_Talk_FRA: In the end, you made the choice a true soldier would, Kyle.

records.m_Talk_ENG: On behalf of the military, thank you, Amy Strickland.
records.m_Talk_DEU: On behalf of the military, thank you, Amy Strickland.
records.m_Talk_FRA: On behalf of the military, thank you, Amy Strickland.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If it hadn't been for you... this operation would've ended in failure. No doubt about it.
records.m_Talk_DEU: If it hadn't been for you... this operation would've ended in failure. No doubt about it.
records.m_Talk_FRA: If it hadn't been for you... this operation would've ended in failure. No doubt about it.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's not like I was looking for gratitude or anything.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's not like I was looking for gratitude or anything.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's not like I was looking for gratitude or anything.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You know as well as I do. It's not like we have another option.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You know as well as I do. It's not like we have another option.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You know as well as I do. It's not like we have another option.

records.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>Attention. Emergency alert for all HQ personnel.</color>
records.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ffd34c>Attention. Emergency alert for all HQ personnel.</color>
records.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>Attention. Emergency alert for all HQ personnel.</color>

records.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>Abnormal Corruption ray detected 10km from HQ.</color>
records.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ffd34c>Abnormal Corruption ray detected 10km from HQ.</color>
records.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>Abnormal Corruption ray detected 10km from HQ.</color>

records.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>Suspected approach of a Demon Lord of Qliphoth or an Apostle.</color>
records.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ffd34c>Suspected approach of a Demon Lord of Qliphoth or an Apostle.</color>
records.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>Suspected approach of a Demon Lord of Qliphoth or an Apostle.</color>

records.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>Effective immediately, all HQ personnel are to prepare for combat.</color>
records.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ffd34c>Effective immediately, all HQ personnel are to prepare for combat.</color>
records.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>Effective immediately, all HQ personnel are to prepare for combat.</color>

records.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>Repeating. All HQ personnel...</color>
records.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ffd34c>Repeating. All HQ personnel...</color>
records.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>Repeating. All HQ personnel...</color>

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ahaha, see? What did I tell you.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ahaha, see? What did I tell you.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ahaha, see? What did I tell you.

records.m_Talk_ENG: In the end, we're just being dragged along by this damned world.
records.m_Talk_DEU: In the end, we're just being dragged along by this damned world.
records.m_Talk_FRA: In the end, we're just being dragged along by this damned world.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Haha, so it really is like that.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Haha, so it really is like that.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Haha, so it really is like that.

records.m_Talk_ENG: *Sigh* This world doesn't even give us a moment to breathe, does it?
records.m_Talk_DEU: *Sigh* This world doesn't even give us a moment to breathe, does it?
records.m_Talk_FRA: *Sigh* This world doesn't even give us a moment to breathe, does it?

records.m_Talk_ENG: All right, ladies. Break time is over.
records.m_Talk_DEU: All right, ladies. Break time is over.
records.m_Talk_FRA: All right, ladies. Break time is over.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You, the injured, should stay here for a bit. Well, you'll be back on the battlefield soon enough anyway.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You, the injured, should stay here for a bit. Well, you'll be back on the battlefield soon enough anyway.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You, the injured, should stay here for a bit. Well, you'll be back on the battlefield soon enough anyway.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Wait.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Wait.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Wait.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You two! Wait, just a second...
records.m_Talk_DEU: You two! Wait, just a second...
records.m_Talk_FRA: You two! Wait, just a second...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Urgh!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Urgh!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Urgh!

records.m_Talk_ENG: A-are you okay, Amy?
records.m_Talk_DEU: A-are you okay, Amy?
records.m_Talk_FRA: A-are you okay, Amy?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Amy... What's up...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Amy... What's up...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Amy... What's up...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: How about a bet before you head out?
records.m_Talk_DEU: How about a bet before you head out?
records.m_Talk_FRA: How about a bet before you head out?

records.m_Talk_ENG: And this time, let's bet something we actually care about.
records.m_Talk_DEU: And this time, let's bet something we actually care about.
records.m_Talk_FRA: And this time, let's bet something we actually care about.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Commander... Commander!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Commander... Commander!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Commander... Commander!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Mm...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Mm...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Mm...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Commander, are you awake?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Commander, are you awake?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Commander, are you awake?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Dominic?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Dominic?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Dominic?

records.m_Talk_ENG: How... How long was I out?
records.m_Talk_DEU: How... How long was I out?
records.m_Talk_FRA: How... How long was I out?

records.m_Talk_ENG: A couple of days.
records.m_Talk_DEU: A couple of days.
records.m_Talk_FRA: A couple of days.

records.m_Talk_ENG: A couple of days?! Ugh!
records.m_Talk_DEU: A couple of days?! Ugh!
records.m_Talk_FRA: A couple of days?! Ugh!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Don't strain yourself. You're badly wounded.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Don't strain yourself. You're badly wounded.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Don't strain yourself. You're badly wounded.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The outside... What's the situation?
records.m_Talk_DEU: The outside... What's the situation?
records.m_Talk_FRA: The outside... What's the situation?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Nothing much has changed.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Nothing much has changed.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Nothing much has changed.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The game is still in progress,
records.m_Talk_DEU: The game is still in progress,
records.m_Talk_FRA: The game is still in progress,

records.m_Talk_ENG: and we're doing our best to keep the Demon Lords of Qliphoth at bay.
records.m_Talk_DEU: and we're doing our best to keep the Demon Lords of Qliphoth at bay.
records.m_Talk_FRA: and we're doing our best to keep the Demon Lords of Qliphoth at bay.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It seems they're here already.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It seems they're here already.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It seems they're here already.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'll try to stop them.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'll try to stop them.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'll try to stop them.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Thank you.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Thank you.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Thank you.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You're welcome.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You're welcome.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You're welcome.

records.m_Talk_ENG: By the way, if you have something to say, you'd better say it now.
records.m_Talk_DEU: By the way, if you have something to say, you'd better say it now.
records.m_Talk_FRA: By the way, if you have something to say, you'd better say it now.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I doubt I can last too long.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I doubt I can last too long.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I doubt I can last too long.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Now, Free Rider ladies. It's time you do your bit. Wake up.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Now, Free Rider ladies. It's time you do your bit. Wake up.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Now, Free Rider ladies. It's time you do your bit. Wake up.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Freedom Riders, not Free Riders.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Freedom Riders, not Free Riders.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Freedom Riders, not Free Riders.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You have to do this until the end, don't you? Stupid GI.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You have to do this until the end, don't you? Stupid GI.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You have to do this until the end, don't you? Stupid GI.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I know, Ms. Hirose.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I know, Ms. Hirose.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I know, Ms. Hirose.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Just because you shared your lousy combat rations with us doesn't mean you can make fun of us like this!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Just because you shared your lousy combat rations with us doesn't mean you can make fun of us like this!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Just because you shared your lousy combat rations with us doesn't mean you can make fun of us like this!

records.m_Talk_ENG: My apologies, ladies. But cut me some slack, will you?
records.m_Talk_DEU: My apologies, ladies. But cut me some slack, will you?
records.m_Talk_FRA: My apologies, ladies. But cut me some slack, will you?

records.m_Talk_ENG: We're all going to die soon. I was only trying to lighten up the mood while I could.
records.m_Talk_DEU: We're all going to die soon. I was only trying to lighten up the mood while I could.
records.m_Talk_FRA: We're all going to die soon. I was only trying to lighten up the mood while I could.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Stuff it.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Stuff it.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Stuff it.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Damn these C.O.s! They're relentless!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Damn these C.O.s! They're relentless!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Damn these C.O.s! They're relentless!

root.m_Talk_ENG: It's gotta be this Immortal System Core or whatever that's drawing them in like moths to a flame!
root.m_Talk_DEU: It's gotta be this Immortal System Core or whatever that's drawing them in like moths to a flame!
root.m_Talk_FRA: It's gotta be this Immortal System Core or whatever that's drawing them in like moths to a flame!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Tch... Why me of all people? Why'd I get stuck with this thing...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Tch... Why me of all people? Why'd I get stuck with this thing...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Tch... Why me of all people? Why'd I get stuck with this thing...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Ngh?!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Ngh?!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Ngh?!

root.m_Talk_ENG: What the?! Where did this thing come from all of a sudden?!
root.m_Talk_DEU: What the?! Where did this thing come from all of a sudden?!
root.m_Talk_FRA: What the?! Where did this thing come from all of a sudden?!

root.m_Talk_ENG: A foolish mortal, daring to lay hands on the Queen's treasure...
root.m_Talk_DEU: A foolish mortal, daring to lay hands on the Queen's treasure...
root.m_Talk_FRA: A foolish mortal, daring to lay hands on the Queen's treasure...

root.m_Talk_ENG: That sin can only be cleansed with your life.
root.m_Talk_DEU: That sin can only be cleansed with your life.
root.m_Talk_FRA: That sin can only be cleansed with your life.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I shall rip you apart and reassemble you a thousand times over, so that you feel every second of the pain.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I shall rip you apart and reassemble you a thousand times over, so that you feel every second of the pain.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I shall rip you apart and reassemble you a thousand times over, so that you feel every second of the pain.

root.m_Talk_ENG: A Shadow...? No, the aura's completely different...!
root.m_Talk_DEU: A Shadow...? No, the aura's completely different...!
root.m_Talk_FRA: A Shadow...? No, the aura's completely different...!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Could it be... the Demon Lord's Apostle?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Could it be... the Demon Lord's Apostle?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Could it be... the Demon Lord's Apostle?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Oh? You dodged my blade not once, but twice. Impressive.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Oh? You dodged my blade not once, but twice. Impressive.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Oh? You dodged my blade not once, but twice. Impressive.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I do wonder... if I tear you limb from limb, what kind of melody would you scream in?
root.m_Talk_DEU: I do wonder... if I tear you limb from limb, what kind of melody would you scream in?
root.m_Talk_FRA: I do wonder... if I tear you limb from limb, what kind of melody would you scream in?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Sorry, no time for a performance!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Sorry, no time for a performance!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Sorry, no time for a performance!

root.m_Talk_ENG: I've got a delivery to make, and I'd rather not find out what happens if I'm late!
root.m_Talk_DEU: I've got a delivery to make, and I'd rather not find out what happens if I'm late!
root.m_Talk_FRA: I've got a delivery to make, and I'd rather not find out what happens if I'm late!

root.m_Talk_ENG: A head-on fight's impossible.
root.m_Talk_DEU: A head-on fight's impossible.
root.m_Talk_FRA: A head-on fight's impossible.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I'll have to create an opening and make a run for it...!
root.m_Talk_DEU: I'll have to create an opening and make a run for it...!
root.m_Talk_FRA: I'll have to create an opening and make a run for it...!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Right now!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Right now!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Right now!

root.m_Talk_ENG: So long, Shadow!
root.m_Talk_DEU: So long, Shadow!
root.m_Talk_FRA: So long, Shadow!

root.m_Talk_ENG: All right, this should at least buy me some time...!
root.m_Talk_DEU: All right, this should at least buy me some time...!
root.m_Talk_FRA: All right, this should at least buy me some time...!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Urgh...?!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Urgh...?!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Urgh...?!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Foolish mortal.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Foolish mortal.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Foolish mortal.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Did you truly think such a petty trick would work on us?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Did you truly think such a petty trick would work on us?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Did you truly think such a petty trick would work on us?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Ahaha, really? A Shadow resorting to sheer numbers?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Ahaha, really? A Shadow resorting to sheer numbers?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Ahaha, really? A Shadow resorting to sheer numbers?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Hey now, it's just me over here! Ganging up's a little cowardly, don't you think?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Hey now, it's just me over here! Ganging up's a little cowardly, don't you think?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Hey now, it's just me over here! Ganging up's a little cowardly, don't you think?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Haha... There's no need to fear, mortal.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Haha... There's no need to fear, mortal.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Haha... There's no need to fear, mortal.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Once the agony of reassembly ends, you too shall forget your past life... and be reborn as one of the Queen's sisters.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Once the agony of reassembly ends, you too shall forget your past life... and be reborn as one of the Queen's sisters.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Once the agony of reassembly ends, you too shall forget your past life... and be reborn as one of the Queen's sisters.

root.m_Talk_ENG: So surrender to your fate, and be consumed by the shadow!
root.m_Talk_DEU: So surrender to your fate, and be consumed by the shadow!
root.m_Talk_FRA: So surrender to your fate, and be consumed by the shadow!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Reborn as a sister, huh?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Reborn as a sister, huh?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Reborn as a sister, huh?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Bad idea. I'm an orphan and a certified troublemaker. You'll regret it if I become your sister.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Bad idea. I'm an orphan and a certified troublemaker. You'll regret it if I become your sister.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Bad idea. I'm an orphan and a certified troublemaker. You'll regret it if I become your sister.

root.m_Talk_ENG: And there's no way I'm dying in a dump like this!
root.m_Talk_DEU: And there's no way I'm dying in a dump like this!
root.m_Talk_FRA: And there's no way I'm dying in a dump like this!

root.m_Talk_ENG: If I go down first, what'll those idiots think of their leader...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: If I go down first, what'll those idiots think of their leader...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: If I go down first, what'll those idiots think of their leader...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Making a last-ditch effort?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Making a last-ditch effort?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Making a last-ditch effort?

root.m_Talk_ENG: To think a mere mortal managed to eliminate five of my sisters in an instant... not bad.
root.m_Talk_DEU: To think a mere mortal managed to eliminate five of my sisters in an instant... not bad.
root.m_Talk_FRA: To think a mere mortal managed to eliminate five of my sisters in an instant... not bad.

root.m_Talk_ENG: But...
root.m_Talk_DEU: But...
root.m_Talk_FRA: But...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Hmm?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Hmm?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Hmm?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Priority Artifact secured.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Priority Artifact secured.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Priority Artifact secured.

root.m_Talk_ENG: You've held out well until now, Free Rider lady.
root.m_Talk_DEU: You've held out well until now, Free Rider lady.
root.m_Talk_FRA: You've held out well until now, Free Rider lady.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Ugh... It's Freedom Rider, not Free Rider...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Ugh... It's Freedom Rider, not Free Rider...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Ugh... It's Freedom Rider, not Free Rider...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Damn it...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Damn it...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Damn it...

root.m_Talk_ENG: You're that soldier from before, aren't you? Still alive, even after that wound?
root.m_Talk_DEU: You're that soldier from before, aren't you? Still alive, even after that wound?
root.m_Talk_FRA: You're that soldier from before, aren't you? Still alive, even after that wound?

root.m_Talk_ENG: For a mortal, your tenacity is truly something else.
root.m_Talk_DEU: For a mortal, your tenacity is truly something else.
root.m_Talk_FRA: For a mortal, your tenacity is truly something else.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Haha! What can I say, I'm hard to kill.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Haha! What can I say, I'm hard to kill.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Haha! What can I say, I'm hard to kill.

root.m_Talk_ENG: So you'd better brace yourself. This one's my revenge match.
root.m_Talk_DEU: So you'd better brace yourself. This one's my revenge match.
root.m_Talk_FRA: So you'd better brace yourself. This one's my revenge match.

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...The Queen summons me.
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...The Queen summons me.
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...The Queen summons me.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I'll withdraw for now.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I'll withdraw for now.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I'll withdraw for now.

root.m_Talk_ENG: But your fate, mortals, was sealed by the Queen from the very beginning.
root.m_Talk_DEU: But your fate, mortals, was sealed by the Queen from the very beginning.
root.m_Talk_FRA: But your fate, mortals, was sealed by the Queen from the very beginning.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Struggle all you like. In the end, everything will be swept away by Her army.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Struggle all you like. In the end, everything will be swept away by Her army.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Struggle all you like. In the end, everything will be swept away by Her army.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Ah hah hah hah hah!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Ah hah hah hah hah!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Ah hah hah hah hah!

root.m_Talk_ENG: I heard the emergency surgery went well.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I heard the emergency surgery went well.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I heard the emergency surgery went well.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Feeling any better, lady?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Feeling any better, lady?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Feeling any better, lady?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Still wearing those damn sunglasses indoors? No wonder you can't see straight, you useless Colonel.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Still wearing those damn sunglasses indoors? No wonder you can't see straight, you useless Colonel.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Still wearing those damn sunglasses indoors? No wonder you can't see straight, you useless Colonel.

root.m_Talk_ENG: You stitched someone back from the brink of death without anesthesia and you're asking if I'm feeling any better?!
root.m_Talk_DEU: You stitched someone back from the brink of death without anesthesia and you're asking if I'm feeling any better?!
root.m_Talk_FRA: You stitched someone back from the brink of death without anesthesia and you're asking if I'm feeling any better?!

root.m_Talk_ENG: It hurts like hell! I'm barely not dead.
root.m_Talk_DEU: It hurts like hell! I'm barely not dead.
root.m_Talk_FRA: It hurts like hell! I'm barely not dead.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Haha, then we're in luck.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Haha, then we're in luck.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Haha, then we're in luck.

root.m_Talk_ENG: See, Minseo? What did I tell you?
root.m_Talk_DEU: See, Minseo? What did I tell you?
root.m_Talk_FRA: See, Minseo? What did I tell you?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Told you. There's no way Amy would die that easily. She's basically immortal.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Told you. There's no way Amy would die that easily. She's basically immortal.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Told you. There's no way Amy would die that easily. She's basically immortal.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Now hand over that chocolate bar you bet.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Now hand over that chocolate bar you bet.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Now hand over that chocolate bar you bet.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Can't believe it... She actually cleared a five-star main quest and came back alive...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Can't believe it... She actually cleared a five-star main quest and came back alive...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Can't believe it... She actually cleared a five-star main quest and came back alive...

root.m_Talk_ENG: I lost, Ms. Hirose... Amy really is a cheat character.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I lost, Ms. Hirose... Amy really is a cheat character.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I lost, Ms. Hirose... Amy really is a cheat character.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Hey, come on...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Hey, come on...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Hey, come on...

root.m_Talk_ENG: I almost died out there, and you were gambling with my life?!
root.m_Talk_DEU: I almost died out there, and you were gambling with my life?!
root.m_Talk_FRA: I almost died out there, and you were gambling with my life?!

root.m_Talk_ENG: No, Amy! It's not like that.
root.m_Talk_DEU: No, Amy! It's not like that.
root.m_Talk_FRA: No, Amy! It's not like that.

root.m_Talk_ENG: It was our own little... ritual to make sure you came back safe.
root.m_Talk_DEU: It was our own little... ritual to make sure you came back safe.
root.m_Talk_FRA: It was our own little... ritual to make sure you came back safe.

root.m_Talk_ENG: A ritual? What kind of nonsense is that supposed to be?
root.m_Talk_DEU: A ritual? What kind of nonsense is that supposed to be?
root.m_Talk_FRA: A ritual? What kind of nonsense is that supposed to be?

root.m_Talk_ENG: No, Ms. Hirose is right.
root.m_Talk_DEU: No, Ms. Hirose is right.
root.m_Talk_FRA: No, Ms. Hirose is right.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Actually... I've got this weird curse. Every time I bet on something, I lose.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Actually... I've got this weird curse. Every time I bet on something, I lose.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Actually... I've got this weird curse. Every time I bet on something, I lose.

root.m_Talk_ENG: So... I bet my chocolate bar against our leader coming back...
root.m_Talk_DEU: So... I bet my chocolate bar against our leader coming back...
root.m_Talk_FRA: So... I bet my chocolate bar against our leader coming back...

root.m_Talk_ENG: I just thought... maybe if I bet against you, fate would flip it and bring you back safely...
root.m_Talk_DEU: I just thought... maybe if I bet against you, fate would flip it and bring you back safely...
root.m_Talk_FRA: I just thought... maybe if I bet against you, fate would flip it and bring you back safely...

root.m_Talk_ENG: So?
root.m_Talk_DEU: So?
root.m_Talk_FRA: So?

root.m_Talk_ENG: So my life's only worth one chocolate bar to you, Minseo? That's all I am to you?!
root.m_Talk_DEU: So my life's only worth one chocolate bar to you, Minseo? That's all I am to you?!
root.m_Talk_FRA: So my life's only worth one chocolate bar to you, Minseo? That's all I am to you?!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Eeeek...! I mean... betting something expensive felt like too much pressure...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Eeeek...! I mean... betting something expensive felt like too much pressure...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Eeeek...! I mean... betting something expensive felt like too much pressure...

root.m_Talk_ENG: H-Haha...! Anyway! Amy made it back safe, and that's what really matters, right?
root.m_Talk_DEU: H-Haha...! Anyway! Amy made it back safe, and that's what really matters, right?
root.m_Talk_FRA: H-Haha...! Anyway! Amy made it back safe, and that's what really matters, right?

root.m_Talk_ENG: R-Right! Best news we've had all day!
root.m_Talk_DEU: R-Right! Best news we've had all day!
root.m_Talk_FRA: R-Right! Best news we've had all day!

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...Hah hah hah!
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...Hah hah hah!
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...Hah hah hah!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Hah hah hah hah...! O-Ouch...!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Hah hah hah hah...! O-Ouch...!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Hah hah hah hah...! O-Ouch...!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Whoa, careful! Laughing that hard might tear your stitches!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Whoa, careful! Laughing that hard might tear your stitches!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Whoa, careful! Laughing that hard might tear your stitches!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Haha, no matter how crazy the world gets, you're still the same bunch of lovable idiots...!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Haha, no matter how crazy the world gets, you're still the same bunch of lovable idiots...!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Haha, no matter how crazy the world gets, you're still the same bunch of lovable idiots...!

root.m_Talk_ENG: But hey, that's what being a Freedom Rider's all about, right?
root.m_Talk_DEU: But hey, that's what being a Freedom Rider's all about, right?
root.m_Talk_FRA: But hey, that's what being a Freedom Rider's all about, right?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Come on, that's just mean! We were genuinely worried, but you call us idiots?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Come on, that's just mean! We were genuinely worried, but you call us idiots?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Come on, that's just mean! We were genuinely worried, but you call us idiots?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Ms. Hirose, seriously... clean the chocolate off your mouth before making a point.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Ms. Hirose, seriously... clean the chocolate off your mouth before making a point.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Ms. Hirose, seriously... clean the chocolate off your mouth before making a point.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Are we done with the heartfelt reunion, ladies?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Are we done with the heartfelt reunion, ladies?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Are we done with the heartfelt reunion, ladies?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Good. Now, I've got a question for Amy.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Good. Now, I've got a question for Amy.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Good. Now, I've got a question for Amy.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I see...
root.m_Talk_DEU: I see...
root.m_Talk_FRA: I see...

root.m_Talk_ENG: More Category 4 C.O.s occupied the facility in addition to the one I defeated...
root.m_Talk_DEU: More Category 4 C.O.s occupied the facility in addition to the one I defeated...
root.m_Talk_FRA: More Category 4 C.O.s occupied the facility in addition to the one I defeated...

root.m_Talk_ENG: If that's the case, then Kyle and Sylvia, who stayed behind...
root.m_Talk_DEU: If that's the case, then Kyle and Sylvia, who stayed behind...
root.m_Talk_FRA: If that's the case, then Kyle and Sylvia, who stayed behind...

root.m_Talk_ENG: They're probably dead.
root.m_Talk_DEU: They're probably dead.
root.m_Talk_FRA: They're probably dead.

root.m_Talk_ENG: If they were alive, they would've contacted HQ by now, one way or another.
root.m_Talk_DEU: If they were alive, they would've contacted HQ by now, one way or another.
root.m_Talk_FRA: If they were alive, they would've contacted HQ by now, one way or another.

root.m_Talk_ENG: In the end, you made the choice a true soldier would, Kyle.
root.m_Talk_DEU: In the end, you made the choice a true soldier would, Kyle.
root.m_Talk_FRA: In the end, you made the choice a true soldier would, Kyle.

root.m_Talk_ENG: On behalf of the military, thank you, Amy Strickland.
root.m_Talk_DEU: On behalf of the military, thank you, Amy Strickland.
root.m_Talk_FRA: On behalf of the military, thank you, Amy Strickland.

root.m_Talk_ENG: If it hadn't been for you... this operation would've ended in failure. No doubt about it.
root.m_Talk_DEU: If it hadn't been for you... this operation would've ended in failure. No doubt about it.
root.m_Talk_FRA: If it hadn't been for you... this operation would've ended in failure. No doubt about it.

root.m_Talk_ENG: It's not like I was looking for gratitude or anything.
root.m_Talk_DEU: It's not like I was looking for gratitude or anything.
root.m_Talk_FRA: It's not like I was looking for gratitude or anything.

root.m_Talk_ENG: You know as well as I do. It's not like we have another option.
root.m_Talk_DEU: You know as well as I do. It's not like we have another option.
root.m_Talk_FRA: You know as well as I do. It's not like we have another option.

root.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>Attention. Emergency alert for all HQ personnel.</color>
root.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ffd34c>Attention. Emergency alert for all HQ personnel.</color>
root.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>Attention. Emergency alert for all HQ personnel.</color>

root.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>Abnormal Corruption ray detected 10km from HQ.</color>
root.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ffd34c>Abnormal Corruption ray detected 10km from HQ.</color>
root.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>Abnormal Corruption ray detected 10km from HQ.</color>

root.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>Suspected approach of a Demon Lord of Qliphoth or an Apostle.</color>
root.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ffd34c>Suspected approach of a Demon Lord of Qliphoth or an Apostle.</color>
root.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>Suspected approach of a Demon Lord of Qliphoth or an Apostle.</color>

root.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>Effective immediately, all HQ personnel are to prepare for combat.</color>
root.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ffd34c>Effective immediately, all HQ personnel are to prepare for combat.</color>
root.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>Effective immediately, all HQ personnel are to prepare for combat.</color>

root.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>Repeating. All HQ personnel...</color>
root.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ffd34c>Repeating. All HQ personnel...</color>
root.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>Repeating. All HQ personnel...</color>

root.m_Talk_ENG: Ahaha, see? What did I tell you.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Ahaha, see? What did I tell you.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Ahaha, see? What did I tell you.

root.m_Talk_ENG: In the end, we're just being dragged along by this damned world.
root.m_Talk_DEU: In the end, we're just being dragged along by this damned world.
root.m_Talk_FRA: In the end, we're just being dragged along by this damned world.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Haha, so it really is like that.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Haha, so it really is like that.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Haha, so it really is like that.

root.m_Talk_ENG: *Sigh* This world doesn't even give us a moment to breathe, does it?
root.m_Talk_DEU: *Sigh* This world doesn't even give us a moment to breathe, does it?
root.m_Talk_FRA: *Sigh* This world doesn't even give us a moment to breathe, does it?

root.m_Talk_ENG: All right, ladies. Break time is over.
root.m_Talk_DEU: All right, ladies. Break time is over.
root.m_Talk_FRA: All right, ladies. Break time is over.

root.m_Talk_ENG: You, the injured, should stay here for a bit. Well, you'll be back on the battlefield soon enough anyway.
root.m_Talk_DEU: You, the injured, should stay here for a bit. Well, you'll be back on the battlefield soon enough anyway.
root.m_Talk_FRA: You, the injured, should stay here for a bit. Well, you'll be back on the battlefield soon enough anyway.

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...Wait.
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...Wait.
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...Wait.

root.m_Talk_ENG: You two! Wait, just a second...
root.m_Talk_DEU: You two! Wait, just a second...
root.m_Talk_FRA: You two! Wait, just a second...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Urgh!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Urgh!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Urgh!

root.m_Talk_ENG: A-are you okay, Amy?
root.m_Talk_DEU: A-are you okay, Amy?
root.m_Talk_FRA: A-are you okay, Amy?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Amy... What's up...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Amy... What's up...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Amy... What's up...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: How about a bet before you head out?
root.m_Talk_DEU: How about a bet before you head out?
root.m_Talk_FRA: How about a bet before you head out?

root.m_Talk_ENG: And this time, let's bet something we actually care about.
root.m_Talk_DEU: And this time, let's bet something we actually care about.
root.m_Talk_FRA: And this time, let's bet something we actually care about.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Commander... Commander!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Commander... Commander!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Commander... Commander!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Mm...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Mm...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Mm...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Commander, are you awake?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Commander, are you awake?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Commander, are you awake?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Dominic?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Dominic?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Dominic?

root.m_Talk_ENG: How... How long was I out?
root.m_Talk_DEU: How... How long was I out?
root.m_Talk_FRA: How... How long was I out?

root.m_Talk_ENG: A couple of days.
root.m_Talk_DEU: A couple of days.
root.m_Talk_FRA: A couple of days.

root.m_Talk_ENG: A couple of days?! Ugh!
root.m_Talk_DEU: A couple of days?! Ugh!
root.m_Talk_FRA: A couple of days?! Ugh!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Don't strain yourself. You're badly wounded.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Don't strain yourself. You're badly wounded.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Don't strain yourself. You're badly wounded.

root.m_Talk_ENG: The outside... What's the situation?
root.m_Talk_DEU: The outside... What's the situation?
root.m_Talk_FRA: The outside... What's the situation?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Nothing much has changed.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Nothing much has changed.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Nothing much has changed.

root.m_Talk_ENG: The game is still in progress,
root.m_Talk_DEU: The game is still in progress,
root.m_Talk_FRA: The game is still in progress,

root.m_Talk_ENG: and we're doing our best to keep the Demon Lords of Qliphoth at bay.
root.m_Talk_DEU: and we're doing our best to keep the Demon Lords of Qliphoth at bay.
root.m_Talk_FRA: and we're doing our best to keep the Demon Lords of Qliphoth at bay.

root.m_Talk_ENG: It seems they're here already.
root.m_Talk_DEU: It seems they're here already.
root.m_Talk_FRA: It seems they're here already.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I'll try to stop them.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I'll try to stop them.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I'll try to stop them.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Thank you.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Thank you.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Thank you.

root.m_Talk_ENG: You're welcome.
root.m_Talk_DEU: You're welcome.
root.m_Talk_FRA: You're welcome.

root.m_Talk_ENG: By the way, if you have something to say, you'd better say it now.
root.m_Talk_DEU: By the way, if you have something to say, you'd better say it now.
root.m_Talk_FRA: By the way, if you have something to say, you'd better say it now.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I doubt I can last too long.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I doubt I can last too long.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I doubt I can last too long.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Now, Free Rider ladies. It's time you do your bit. Wake up.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Now, Free Rider ladies. It's time you do your bit. Wake up.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Now, Free Rider ladies. It's time you do your bit. Wake up.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Freedom Riders, not Free Riders.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Freedom Riders, not Free Riders.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Freedom Riders, not Free Riders.

root.m_Talk_ENG: You have to do this until the end, don't you? Stupid GI.
root.m_Talk_DEU: You have to do this until the end, don't you? Stupid GI.
root.m_Talk_FRA: You have to do this until the end, don't you? Stupid GI.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I know, Ms. Hirose.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I know, Ms. Hirose.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I know, Ms. Hirose.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Just because you shared your lousy combat rations with us doesn't mean you can make fun of us like this!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Just because you shared your lousy combat rations with us doesn't mean you can make fun of us like this!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Just because you shared your lousy combat rations with us doesn't mean you can make fun of us like this!

root.m_Talk_ENG: My apologies, ladies. But cut me some slack, will you?
root.m_Talk_DEU: My apologies, ladies. But cut me some slack, will you?
root.m_Talk_FRA: My apologies, ladies. But cut me some slack, will you?

root.m_Talk_ENG: We're all going to die soon. I was only trying to lighten up the mood while I could.
root.m_Talk_DEU: We're all going to die soon. I was only trying to lighten up the mood while I could.
root.m_Talk_FRA: We're all going to die soon. I was only trying to lighten up the mood while I could.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Stuff it.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Stuff it.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Stuff it.
